class.name: SuperMarker3D
class.brief_description: Graphic-design-oriented 3D marker node — seven shapes with wireframe or billboarded silhouette rendering.
class.description:
SuperMarker3D is a standalone debug/annotation node. It does not require a [MultiNode] parent, though it can also be used as a template child of one (SuperMarkerHandler draws per-instance copies).
Seven shapes: Cross, Diamond, Sphere, Axis, Cube, Arrow, Flat Arrow.
Two detail modes: [b]DETAIL_WIREFRAME[/b] — edges as face-normal quads (back-culled so only camera-front edges show) plus optional solid fill. Looks like a real mesh at any angle. [b]DETAIL_SILHOUETTE[/b] — billboarded 2D outline + optional fill, always faces the camera.
Arrow-shape properties configure the arrowhead style, tail flare, and head dimensions.

members.member: Which shape to draw.
Overall size in meters.
[code]DETAIL_WIREFRAME[/code] (0) or [code]DETAIL_SILHOUETTE[/code] (1).
Edge / outline color.
Thickness of edge quads (wireframe) or outline lines (silhouette). 0 = thin lines.
Draw solid fill in addition to the outline.
Fill color when [member fill_enabled] is true.
Curve only: color of dash/dot gap panels. Transparent by default (gaps are invisible).
Render both sides of the geometry. Mesh types use two surfaces; flat types (Shape, flat Curve) use a single cull-disabled surface.
When [member two_sided] is false, renders the back face instead of the front face.
Axis shape only: color of the X axis line.
Axis shape only: color of the Y axis line.
Axis shape only: color of the Z axis line.
Arrow shapes: length of the arrowhead as a fraction of total size.
Arrow shapes: width of the arrowhead.
Triangle, Diamond, or Chevron.
[code]TAIL_NONE[/code] (0) or [code]TAIL_FLARED[/code] (1).
Flared tail length (when [member tail_style] = [code]TAIL_FLARED[/code]).
If true, the marker only renders in the editor.
If true, disables depth testing — marker draws over opaque geometry.
